evals.name: perf-optimization
evals.prompt: 这个数据处理函数在抖音数据量到 5000 条时特别慢，帮我优化一下
evals.expected_output: Should diagnose O(n²) dedup + O(n²) bubble sort, recommend Hash Map + Array.sort, implement the fix, and create .algo-profile/ cards

assertions.text: Correctly identifies the O(n²) nested loop dedup as the primary bottleneck
Uses Map/Object for O(1) dedup lookup instead of nested loop
Replaces manual bubble sort with Array.sort() or equivalent O(n log n)
Creates .algo-profile/ directory with at least one profile card

evals.name: cache-implementation
evals.prompt: wyz-report-web 的 collector 需要一个缓存机制，API 请求结果缓存 10 分钟，最多存 200 条
evals.expected_output: Should recommend LRU Cache with TTL, implement it, integrate into the existing fetchPlatformData flow, and create a profile card

assertions.text: Recommends or implements LRU Cache (or equivalent bounded cache with eviction)
Implements capacity limit of 200 entries with eviction
Integrates cache into existing fetchPlatformData or batchCollect flow
Creates .algo-profile/ card for the cache implementation

evals.name: profile-reuse
evals.prompt: 我需要在另一个模块也做频率统计，之前在 collector 里用过类似的
evals.expected_output: Should check .algo-profile/, find the existing hash-map-freq-counter card, reference it, and implement the frequency analysis using the same pattern

assertions.text: Checks .algo-profile/ directory before recommending from scratch
References the existing hash-map-freq-counter profile card
Implements analyzeSignalFrequency using Map-based frequency counting
All three return fields (byType, byPlatform, topSignals) are implemented
